flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mount St. Mary's University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 1.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Mount St. Mary's University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (58.0% vs 64.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mount St. Mary's University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mount St. Mary's University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (55.1% → 62.5%).
